query: show me 7 11's in south lake union seattle
target_feature: is a 7-Eleven inside South Lake Union

results.name: 7-Eleven — 362 Denny Way
results.summary: The only 7-Eleven inside the strict South Lake Union boundary, sitting at the SW corner of Denny Way and Aurora Ave N. Open 24/7, store #23109. Foursquare and Yelp both file this location under the 'South Lake Union' neighborhood. Standard convenience-store footprint with a small white box building and an adjacent surface parking lot, visible from satellite.
results.features_quote: Address: 362 Denny Way, Seattle, WA 98109-4912 | Store #: 23109 | Hours: Open 24/7 | Phone: (206) 443-0711 | Services: ATM, Beer, Wine, Hot Foods, Lottery, Propane, Redbox, Amazon Locker, Key Cafe, EBT Accepted, Mobile Checkout, 7-Eleven Wallet
results.observation: Satellite shows a small white single-story storefront with a surface parking lot behind it, fronting Denny Way at the Aurora intersection — matches a typical 7-Eleven footprint.

results.name: 7-Eleven — 1830 Minor Ave
results.summary: Sits one block south of Denny Way at Minor Ave & Howell. Officially zoned 98101 (downtown) and labeled 'Denny Triangle' rather than SLU by most sources, but it is the closest 7-Eleven to the southern edge of SLU and a common walking-distance stop for SLU workers. Open 24/7, store #41883. Includes validated parking.
results.backboard_quote: The 7-Eleven at 1830 Minor Ave is located in Seattle, WA 98101 in the Denny Triangle neighborhood
results.features_quote: Address: 1830 Minor Ave, Seattle, WA 98101 | Store #: 41883 | Hours: Open 24/7 | Phone: (206) 724-6138 | Services: ATM, Beer, Wine, Mobile Checkout, 7-Eleven Wallet, Validated Parking

results.name: 7-Eleven — 819 Virginia St
results.summary: Located at 819 Virginia St in the Belltown neighborhood, several blocks south of Denny Way and well outside South Lake Union. Included here only as the next-nearest store south of SLU for context. Store #35532.
results.backboard_quote: The 7-Eleven is located at 819 Virginia St, Seattle, WA 98101-4421 in the Belltown neighborhood
results.features_quote: Address: 819 Virginia St, Seattle, WA 98101 | Store #: 35532 | Phone: (206) 623-0413 | Services: ATM, Beer, Wine, Hot Foods, Lottery, Propane, EBT Accepted, Mobile Checkout, 7NOW Delivery, Money Orders
